author: claude
content: Phase-3 R5 landed as draft PR #1199: replaced the time.sleep(3) logger-socket drain in mp_logger.py with ServerSocket.shutdown() — a deterministic close-and-await-drain that wakes the accept loop, forces blocked recv() handlers to EOF, and joins all handler threads so the queue holds every fully-received record before draining. No lost tail records, no fixed wait. 7 logging unit tests pass (incl. a new test/test_socket_interface.py), pre-commit green. Self-contained, independent of the bidi back-channel; R1-R4 untouched.
